actionUnits.condition: Exercise AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour id 764083142; m_Script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) by causing physics trigger enter/exit on platform2 (1). Preconditions: (1) BoxCollider id 764083144 must be set to m_IsTrigger=1 (currently 0) OR a Rigidbody must exist on at least one of the colliding objects; (2) The serialized field 'player' on this component must reference this same GameObject (platform2 (1)), because the script checks 'if (gameObject == player)'. With these set, move a Player collider (with Rigidbody) into the platform's trigger volume to invoke OnTriggerEnter and then move it out to invoke OnTriggerExit. Expected behavior: on enter, player.transform.SetParent(platform2 (1).transform, true); on exit, player.transform.parent = null.
